description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a modern, urban style, featuring a long, collared jacket layered over a hoodie and straight-cut pants. The figure wears dark sunglasses and has short, neatly styled hair. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, and the feet are positioned flat on the ground, suggesting a neutral, standing pose. The jacket appears to be thick and structured, with a visible collar and a hood draped over the back. The shoes are robust and practical, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall appearance is that of a city pedestrian, possibly in cool weather, with a confident and composed demeanor.
description: An adult male in a long jacket over a hoodie, straight pants, and sunglasses, standing in a relaxed pose. The figure has short hair and wears sturdy shoes, embodying a typical urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, sunglasses, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the jacket's thickness, hood, and shoe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the hood draped over the back and the straight cut of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jacket's structure and hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: long collared jacket over a hoodie, straight-cut pants, sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
